name: install.sh
description: Installs git hooks by routing this worktree to .githooks via worktree-local core.hooksPath

name: server-manager.js
description: Manages Mintlify dev server lifecycle for browser tests (start/stop/health-check)
pipeline: manual — legacy browser-validation module imported by .githooks/verify-browser.js

name: verify-browser.js
description: Verifies browser availability for Puppeteer-based integration tests

name: verify.sh
description: Pre-commit sub-hook — verifies file-walker is available and runs structural checks on staged files

name: fetch-contract-addresses.js
description: Thin CLI entrypoint for the chain-first contracts pipeline.
policy: Docs-local files do not define publishable contract truth.

name: fetch-discord-announcements.js
description: Fetches announcements from Discord channels via bot token. Writes per-product
policy: Announcements channel only. No general chat. Requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.

name: fetch-ghost-blog-data.js
description: Fetches Livepeer blog posts via public RSS feed (blog.livepeer.org/rss/). No API key required. Writes to snippets/data/social-feeds/ghostBlogData.jsx.
policy: PUBLIC RSS only. No API keys.

name: fetch-github-discussions.js
description: Fetches latest GitHub Discussions via public GraphQL API, writes per-product JSX data files.
policy: Public repos only. Uses GITHUB_TOKEN for rate limits (optional for public repos).

name: fetch-github-releases.js
description: Fetches latest GitHub Releases via public REST API, writes per-product JSX data files.
policy: Public repos only. No auth needed for public repos. GITHUB_TOKEN optional for rate limits.

name: fetch-rss-blog-data.js
description: Generic RSS blog fetcher. Reads product config, fetches RSS feeds (Ghost, Leaflet, etc.), writes per-product JSX data files.
policy: PUBLIC APIs / RSS only. No API keys for platforms we don't own.

name: generate-changelog.js
description: Unified changelog generator for all changelog targets (solutions, contracts, resources).
pipeline: config → GitHub/GitLab REST API → [LLM optional] → [on-chain verify optional] → changelog.mdx
policy: Public repos only. GITHUB_TOKEN optional (rate limits). No secrets in output.

name: audit-component-usage.js
description: Component usage auditor — scans pages for component usage patterns and reports statistics

name: scan-component-imports.js
description: Scans MDX imports to produce component-usage-map.json and detect @usedIn drift.

name: page-imports-audit.js

name: page-links-audit.js

scope: operations/scripts, operations/reports/health/page-links, v2 docs page surfaces

name: audit-copy-patterns.js
description: Aggregate copy pattern violations across a tab or full v2 tree and emit a diagnostic report.

name: audit-media-assets.js
description: Audits repo media assets, references, ignore leakage, and externalized asset branch inventory.
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: audit-python.py
description: Python page audit utility — validates routed docs files, snippet imports, and internal links, then writes page-audit reports

name: audit-v2-usefulness.js
description: Usefulness auditor — scores v2 MDX pages on human and agent usefulness with source-weighted 2026 accuracy verification
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: terminology-search.js

name: docs-page-research.js

name: docs-research-adjudication.js
description: Docs research adjudication ledger — validates, records, and summarizes measured review outcomes for the page-content research workflow so trust decisions are based on real usage rather than intuition.

name: audit-tasks-folders.js
description: Tasks folder auditor — checks workspace/ structure, normalises report locations, applies recommendations with conflict-safe moves

name: generate-v2-folder-governance-cleanup-matrix.js

pipeline: external content -> sanitise -> safe MDX/JSX output

name: page-integrity-rolling-issue.js
description: Rolling issue helper — decides create/update/close behavior for unresolved page-integrity findings and formats issue bodies for workflow automation.

pipeline: PostToolUse hook → reads stdin → path check → grep consumers → emit list

usage: Called automatically by Claude Code PostToolUse hook. Not invoked directly.

name: headless-batch.sh
purpose: Run Claude Code headless for safe batch operations

pipeline: CLI → claude headless → restricted tools → output file
scope: Any batch operation that is well-defined and repeatable
policy: No Write/Edit unless explicitly included in --tools

pipeline: UserPromptSubmit hook → reads stdin → saves long messages → exits

usage: Called automatically by Claude Code PostToolUseFailure hook. Not invoked directly.

pipeline: PreCompact hook → reads critical files → builds state summary → injects via systemMessage
